case_title: TIMOTHY V. BRINK VS. MICHELLE L. DEVERELL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BRINK, TIMOTHY V. AS TO DEFENDANT DEVERELL, MICHELLE L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRINK, TIMOTHY V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVERELL, MICHELLE L. $175.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $329.50, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1750.00 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES AND PERSONAL INJURY AND ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$79.50) SERVED JUL-30-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEVERELL, MICHELLE L.
